reachability_artifacts: TestAutoTransitionToLive: auto-transitions when in-progress tracks exist in DB
TestLiveBoardToggle: l/b toggle between board and live views
TestConcurrentStatusPoll: LiveView polls DB and populates rows with elapsed time
TestHasInProgressTracks: DB query correctly detects in-progress tracks
Smoke step: run `sworn run --parallel` in fixture repo, then `sworn` in separate terminal, navigate to release, observe live view with incrementing elapsed time

violations: Gate 1 + Gate 3 (CRITICAL): Model.Update() (model.go:56-64) has no tickMsg case — message dropped, tick chain terminates after first fire, DB polled only once. Spec acceptance check #2 ('updates every ~1 second') not met in running TUI. TestConcurrentStatusPoll tests tick via lv.Update(tickMsg{}) directly on LiveView, bypassing Model.Update() — Rule 1 violation.
Gate 2: internal/tui/styles.go changed (adds LiveTitle, LiveRow, DividerLine) but absent from spec's Planned touchpoints and not mentioned in proof.md Divergence from plan.

design_decisions.rationale: TUI discovers repoRoot via git; DB path is filepath.Join(repoRoot, ".sworn", "sworn.db"). The run-loop creates it there. SQLite WAL supports concurrent readers.
tea.Tick delivers tickMsg to Update, staying within Bubble Tea's single-goroutine model. Avoids goroutine lifecycle management.
Live view reads from tracks SQLite table (tracks.started_at, current_slice, state). Board view reads status.json. Two distinct sources with different freshness characteristics.
viewLive is a sibling of viewBoard in the root model's state machine. l/b toggles between them; esc returns to viewReleases from either. Clean keyboard semantics.
Uses os.UserHomeDir() + /.config/sworn/credits.json matching the config pattern. Spec prescribes ~/.config/sworn/credits.json explicitly.
